    • Uses of SubFigure in org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity

      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.android.activity with parameters of type SubFigure 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void FigureView.EventHandler.componentRemoval(Figure parent, SubFigure subfigure) 

    • Uses of SubFigure in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor that implement SubFigure 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractEllipsoidAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for all the anchor figures based on ellipsoid.
      class  AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for all the rectangular or squared anchor figures.
      class  AnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This is the anchor that permit to connect EdgeFigure and NodeFigure.
      class  InvisibleCircleAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a circle frame.
      class  InvisibleEllipsoidAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a ellipsoid frame.
      class  InvisibleRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a rectangle frame.
      class  InvisibleRoundRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a round rectangle frame.
      class  InvisibleSquareAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a square frame.

    • Uses of SubFigure in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.factory

      Methods in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.factory that return SubFigure 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      SubFigure FigureFactory.createSubFigureInside(UUID viewID, G graph, Figure parent, ModelObject object)
      Create a sub figure for the given model object inside the given figure.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void FigureFactory.removeSubFigureFrom(UUID viewID, G graph, Figure parent, SubFigure subfigure)
      Remove a sub figure for the given figure.
      void AbstractStandardFigureFactory.removeSubFigureFrom(UUID viewID, G graph, Figure parent, SubFigure subfigure)
      Remove a sub figure for the given figure.

    • Uses of SubFigure in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.subfigure

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.subfigure that implement SubFigure 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractModelObjectSubFigure<M extends ModelObject>
      This class is the base class for graphical representation of model elements.
      class  AbstractSubFigure
      This class is the base class all the figures that are linked to other figures such as the anchors inside the nodes.
